The Fukushima Disaster: Sequence of events
Earthquake strikes
Reactors (37) {{BLANK}} (new source of power now needed for coolant system)

Tsunami hits after 50 minutes, (38) {{BLANK}} sea-wall defences
Turbine halls become flooded
(39) {{BLANK}} are disabled

Explosion next day leaves containment building’s roof collapsed; meltdown is (40) {{BLANK}}
